title: lastrea hirta
intro: Lastrea hirta, also known as the hairy lady fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Africa. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant's extracts have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Lastrea hirta is often used in infusions, decoctions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
